name: Ljubljana (Slovenia)

colors.symbolism: the lower stripe — derived from the city's heraldic colour
the city dragon and tower of the arms

description: Two horizontal stripes — white over green — with the coat of arms of Ljubljana centred or in the upper hoist: a dragon atop a tower on green.
history: Ljubljana is the capital and largest city of Slovenia. The city's symbol is the Ljubljana Dragon, prominently featured on its coat of arms.

features.role: Coat of arms of Ljubljana (Dragon atop a tower)
